docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE REQUESTED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALALE, HASAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EARTHLINK $1,235.64 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,320.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALALE, HASAN AS TO DEFENDANT EARTHLINK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-14-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EARTHLINK
COURTESY COPY OF CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT EARTHLINK TO PLTF HASAN ALALE DATED JAN. 28, 2008, FILED.
ORDER SC-108A: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER IS "DENIED". THE COURT CONSIDERED THE ISSUE OF THE BOND PREMIUM IN REACHING ITS DECISION. COPY OF THE ORDER SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF ALALE, HASAN
PLAINTIFF FILED SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OF CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER. SUBMITTED TO COURT AND ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ALALE, HASAN AS TO DEFENDANT EARTHLINK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPY OF SC-108: "ANSWER" ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED AND FILED.
